# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

Questions for leegality meeting: 

- [ ]  How to do journey where customer is not sent communication of signing request
- [ ]  How to send details that need to be filled in the agreement?
- [ ]  Discuss the flow and exact APIs that we need to use
- [ ]  For Aadhaar OTP, in SDK integration we don’t want to send an extra OTP for signer authentication. Check why is this not coming for Lalit.
- [x]  Reduce margin of the document view screen
- [ ]  Don’t want to show signer and download
- [ ]  Make the real template
- [ ]  Proceed CTA is too small, make it bigger reduce the leegality logo size
- [ ]  Enable mobile OTP for Digio
- [ ]  Commercial for white labelling
